回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	114學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 英語能力測驗 (English Proficiency Assessment)	開課班級 : 應英二年級	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 李盈興	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
- This course aims to help students get familiarized with the pattern of the Test of English for International Communication (TOEIC) and get instant access to the desirable scores of their goals for the test. - Students are particularly oriented to expand useful English vocabulary, as well as develop their capabilities of listening and reading comprehension throughout this course. - The content of the course comprises a series of reading and listening comprehension exercises, supplemented with three full cycles of simulated TOEIC practices. - Students are encouraged to finish the assignments and prepare the exercises/quizzes before they come to every week’s class. 


2.教學綱要
TOEIC
Test 1
Test 2
Test 3
Test 4
Test 5 (Final)

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Evaluations: Exams 60%; Assignments & Tests 30%; Participation 10%. 
Requirements: Students are required to prepare the weekly materials before they come to class. The teacher will check the attendance; those who are absent or come late will lose 1 score from the final grades for each time. Students should also show respect the class participants by not talking aloud, not wandering from the seats, and not surfing the Internet on their smartphones. They should understand and be responsible for their grades. 
 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG4 優質教育


9.大學社會責任(USR)關聯性：高
